headline: Trump’s Iran War and Tariffs Are Changing Corporate Strategies
summary: Stocks have spent months shrugging off geopolitical shocks, businesses are transforming to prepare for a more volatile world.

headline: Markets Seem Desensitized to Trump’s Iran War and Tariffs but Companies Are Changing in Fundamental Ways
summary: While stocks shrug off oil shocks and global tariff turmoil, businesses are transforming to prepare for a more volatile world.
